artifacts.name: design-review-approval
artifacts.description: Design review approval for FR-TOOL-001 LLD

summary.work_completed: Reviewed LLD for FR-TOOL-001; design approved for implementation.
key_findings: LLD covers all acceptance criteria from PRD
Component architecture aligns with Technical Architecture
Event handling and state management correctly specified

recommended_actions: Implement the Place mode tool according to the approved LLD in docs/features/FR-TOOL-001/LOW_LEVEL_DESIGN.md
Ensure component implementations match the specified interfaces and sequence diagrams
Write unit and behavioral tests for T-FE-TOOL-001-01 and T-FE-TOOL-001-02 (and any other related test IDs)
Verify that all tests pass and the implementation meets the acceptance criteria
Follow the component integration map in docs/TECHNICAL_ARCHITECTURE.md
After implementation, hand off to frontend-review-agent for code review
next_agent_context.summary: Design approved. Proceed with implementation of FR-TOOL-001.
